title: Expression evaluates to undefined after multiple iterations
symptom: After running a workflow for over 100 iterations, an expression that previously evaluated correctly suddenly returns undefined, causing the workflow to fail.
applies_when: Expression is evaluated from a static node
not_this_if: Error occurs in the first few iterations
Expression is dynamic and changes frequently
root_cause: The error occurs because the workflow's static data may not be properly managed across iterations, leading to unexpected behavior after a certain number of executions. This can happen if the static data is not reset or cleared, causing conflicts or memory issues.
fix_steps: Implement a code node to track iterations and manage static data
Reset or clear static data at the end of each iteration
Consider using a sub-workflow to deactivate and reactivate the main workflow to manage long-running processes
agent_instruction: Track iterations using a code node and clear static data to prevent undefined expressions.
safety_notes: Ensure that no important data is lost when clearing static data.
